items.name: Easy Seat Right Side
items.description: criss cross seat with feet as far past knees as possible.

items.name: Easy Seat Left Side
items.description: Use blocks to rest forehead in gentle forward bend

items.name: Fire Log Right
items.description: From easy seat place ankle on knee.

items.name: Cobblers
items.description: Feet together like butterfly

items.name: Cobblers Look Right
items.description: Using blocks adjust so left ear rests on looks blocks

items.name: Cobblers Look Left
items.description: place right ear on blocks, look left.

items.name: Wide Leg Forward Fold Right
items.description: With Legs apart place right elbow on inside of knee, twist and reach left arm overhead toward toes

items.name: Wide Leg Forward Fold Left
items.description: Other side.

items.name: Wide leg forward fold center
items.description: with legs apart bend forward reach hands toward toes

poses.name: Half Splits
poses.description: Right leg forward, left leg bent.  Rock forward and back

poses.name: Splits, right leg forward
poses.description: Enter splits with right leg forward, option to use block for stability.

poses.name: Half Splits, left leg
poses.description: Right leg forward, left leg bent.  Rock forward and back

poses.name: Splits
poses.description: Left leg is forward

poses.name: Three legged dog
poses.description: from down dog lift right leg (option to bind right arm). raise and lift leg 10 times.

poses.name: Pigeon Right Leg
poses.description: From three legged dog enter to active pigeon.

poses.name: active pigeon, left arm
poses.description: reach for the extended leg's foot with left hand

poses.name: active pigeon, right arm
poses.description: reach for the extended leg's foot with right hand

poses.name: resting pigeon
poses.description: lay forward on either blocks or elbows for a resting pigeon.

poses.name: 3 legged dog, left leg
poses.description: sweep folded leg back and up, peddle out your dog and then lift left leg.  same options, lift 10 times.

poses.name: active pigeon, left leg
poses.description: From 3 legged dog sweep into an active pigeon.

poses.name: Pigeon, right arm
poses.description: Reach for the extended leg's foot with right hand

poses.name: Pigeon, left arm
poses.description: Reach for the extended leg's foot with left hand

poses.name: Resting Pigeon
poses.description: Lay forward on either blocks or elbows for a resting pigeon.

poses.name: Return to Dog
poses.description: Sweep folded leg back and up, peddle out your dog.

items.name: Swam
items.description: gracefully lift crest from floor

items.name: Bow (outside)
items.description: Grab feet on outsides

items.name: Bow (inside)
items.description: Grab feet on the inside of sole.

items.name: Locust
items.description: clasp hands behind back and lift chest and legs.

items.name: Childs
items.description: Childs or puppy dog

items.name: Thread needle right arm
items.description: Raise right arm and thread needle

items.name: Thread needle left arm
items.description: unwind right arm and do other side.

items.name: Wrists
items.description: From Table Top lift finger tips.

items.name: Lion's pose
items.description: extend tongue and take deep breathes.

poses.name: Cow Face right leg top
poses.description: From table top, cross right leg over left to secure the right inner knee joint over the left knee cap

poses.name: twist left
poses.description: keeping the hips in place, twist the torso to the left.  option to take a bind.

poses.name: twist right
poses.description: twist to the other side.  be mindful that the sit bones stay firm and grounded.

poses.name: arms behind back
poses.description: reach right arm behind head to meet left arm coming up from behind the back

poses.name: arms behind back (left)
poses.description: other side, reach left arm behind head to meet right arm

poses.name: fold foward
poses.description: reach arms forward and fold at the hips.

items.name: Garland
items.description: Split this time to twist to left and right in Garland pose.  Pause in center for a break if needed.

items.name: Cat Cow
items.description: From Garland, enter table top and do some cat cows.  Use this time to setup for Cow Face on opposite side.

poses.name: Cow Face
poses.description: From Garland, resume

items.name: Scale
items.description: From cow face, place hands on blocks or floor and lift body from ground

items.name: Bridge
items.description: Option to use block to make supported bridge.  option to lift one leg and other.

items.name: Boat
items.description: From bridge role into boat pose.  options to alternate between high and low boat.

items.name: Standing forward fold
items.description: Rock roll to standing and hinge at hips letting arms dangle.

items.name: One leg mountain right side
items.description: stand on left left leg with right leg lifted and bent at knee.  arms overhead in steeple form.

items.name: One leg mountain left side.
items.description: Other side, switch legs and stand on right leg.

poses.name: Right hand to right leg toe
poses.description: Grip big toe and extend leg outwards.  Option to use a strap.

poses.name: Rotate leg to parallel with body
Tree
poses.description: Bring foot to rest on inner thigh or calf.  Caution to not push on knee joint.

poses.name: Left hand to left leg toe
poses.description: Grip big toe and extend leg outwards.  Option to use a strap.

poses.name: Rotate leg to parallel with body
Tree (left side)
poses.description: Bring foot to rest on inner thigh or calf.  Caution to not push on knee joint.

poses.name: Palms down overhead
poses.description: Grip the pole with palms down in front of you, Bring pole overhead to behind back

poses.name: Palms up
poses.description: Grip pole with palms facing up and bring pole overhead to behind back.

poses.name: Overhead rotation right
poses.description: Begin in a wide legged squat, raise pole in hands overhead.  Make clockwise arm rotation with arms out stretched.

poses.name: Overhead rotation left
poses.description: Remain in wide legged squat and go in the opposite direction.

poses.name: Twist while looking
poses.description: Stand with feet hips width appear.  Place pole on shoulders with arms out stretched reaching for end of pole.  Rotate the torso left to right.  Let your head follow the rotation.

poses.name: Twist looking forward.
poses.description: Repeat the torso rotations, but keep the face and gaze looking forward at fixed point.

poses.name: Wide leg folded twists
poses.description: With the pole along the shoulders, and legs in wide legged stance.  Fold forward and rotate opposite end of pole to opposite side of body.  End of pole taps floor beyond the foot.

items.name: Headstand (inversion)
items.description: Release the pole.  From the wide legged stance place hands to floor and bring body into a headstand.  Option to do crow pose or downward dog.

items.name: Child's pose
items.description: From the headstand or other inversion place the body in child's pose.

items.name: Knee to chest
items.description: From child's pose find your way to your back.  Alternate bringing each knee to chest.

items.name: Supine twist (right leg)
items.description: Extend arms, keep back flat to floor, stack hips perpendicular to your mat and bring the right leg across the body to extend to left side.  Use block for support underfoot.

items.name: Supine twist (left leg)
items.description: Opposite side.  Bring right leg back to neutral position and then bring left leg across body.

items.name: Happy baby
items.description: With back flat to mat, bend knees to grab big toes with index fingers.  pull knees to arm pits and gently rock back and forth.

items.name: Reclined Bound Angle Pose (Supta Baddha Konasana)
items.description: Fold a blank to fit the length of the spine.  Sit in bound angle pose at end of blank and lay back so the spine is supported by the blanket.  extend arms and breathe deep and relax.

items.name: Savasana
items.description: Remove blanket and extend legs long.  Tuck in the shoulder blades and place arms long along the sides of the body.  Breathe slowly with intent and relax.  You Did it!
